message:
fix: cache race, file close, worker lifecycle, and dep-type method migration

pkg/loader/git.go:
- Fix revisionCache.get() race condition: release RLock before expired
  entry eviction, then acquire write Lock with double-check under the
  write lock to avoid concurrent double-eviction. Previously held
  RLock across the entire method including the eviction path.
- Move cloned-issues return before RUnlock to avoid use-after-free.

pkg/updater/updater.go:
- Fix downloadFile to close the output file before returning the error
  so write errors (e.g., disk full) are caught. Replaces deferred Close.

pkg/ui/background_worker.go:
- Guard openTraceFile with traceMu lock to prevent concurrent opens.
- Signal done channel when runProcessLoop exits early due to
  WorkerStopped state, preventing callers from blocking forever.

pkg/analysis:
- Migrate dep.Type comparisons from direct model.DepBlocks equality
  checks to dep.Type.IsBlocking() method calls throughout
  advanced_insights.go (5 sites) and label_health.go improvements.
- Remove unused model import from advanced_insights.go.

pkg/export/sqlite_export.go:
- Minor export adjustments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
